summary: Iteration 2: tested ritual-bundle (product detail) + cart drawer free-shipping progress + upsell + promo discount across drawer/cart/checkout. 11/12 review items PASS. 1 CRITICAL bug found on Checkout step transition that breaks finishing an order.
passed: ritual-bundle visible at /produto/spray-sono-ansiedade with 3 toggles (main + spray-concentracao-mindfulness + balsamo-analgesico), all default aria-pressed=true
ritual-total initial = 54,27 € with subtotal 60,30 € strikethrough and 'Poupas 6,03 €' shown
Unchecking one companion updates ritual-total (37,26 €) and keeps savings line
Unchecking second companion → only 1 item left, ritual-total = 18,90 €, strikethrough + 'Poupas' line both disappear (0 strike elements)
Re-checking both companions restores 54,27 €; clicking ritual-add-all shows success toast 'Ritual adicionado ao carrinho — Desconto de ritual aplicado — poupas 6,03 €' and opens cart drawer

Cart drawer shows 3 items, cart-drawer-subtotal=60,30 €, cart-drawer-discount='Desconto ritual (-10%) − 6,03 €', cart-drawer-total=54,27 €, cart-shipping-progress reads 'Boa! Envio grátis desbloqueado.' (afterDiscount=54,27 ≥ 49)

Upsell card cart-upsell-balsamo-labial-mel (cheapest ≤20 € not in cart) appears with cart-upsell-add button; clicking it adds the item (4 items) and a new upsell suggestion (cart-upsell-roll-on-respiracao) replaces it
cart-drawer-remove-promo (X) removes discount; total recalculates to subtotal (no further shipping since ≥49)
/carrinho shows cartpage-discount '− 6,03 €' with cartpage-remove-promo link; clicking it removes discount and recomputes cartpage-total
/checkout summary shows checkout-discount '− 6,03 €' and checkout-total '54,27 €' immediately on load when promo active
failed: CRITICAL: Clicking step-next at step 1 (shipping) does NOT advance to step 2 (payment). Instead the form is submitted (finish()), the cart is cleared, and the user is redirected to /carrinho (because Checkout.jsx renders <Navigate to=/carrinho> when items.length===0). Repro: open /checkout with items + RITUAL10 promo, click step-next twice with default standard shipping. Expected URL=/checkout step 2; Actual URL=/carrinho with empty cart in localStorage. Tried both with and without explicitly clicking ship-standard first — same result.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The same JSX slot renders <button type='button' onClick={next}> while step<2, and <button type='submit'> while step===2. When the user clicks step-next at step=1, React reconciles the same <button> DOM node — it just flips the `type` attribute and re-attaches the onClick. Browsers attribute the *click* event (which triggers implicit form submission for type=submit buttons inside a <form>) to the button as it appears AT THE END of the synchronous click sequence — by then React has already committed the state update and the node is type='submit'. Result: the same physical click that advanced step 1→2 also submits the form, calling finish() → clear() → setItems([]). The functional setState in finish() runs synchronously inside the click handler, so the Checkout re-renders with items=[] and its <Navigate to='/carrinho' replace/> fires before navigate('/checkout/sucesso') can resolve, sending the user to /carrinho instead of /checkout/sucesso.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Render TWO distinct buttons (not one slot that morphs), e.g. always use type='button' and trigger finish() via an explicit onClick on the final step, OR render only one of them inside the form (the submit) and keep step-next OUTSIDE the form. Simplest patch: change the submit button to type='button' and call finish via onClick; remove form's onSubmit handler (or guard finish() with `if (step !== STEPS.length - 1) return;`).
rca_of_the_issue.verification_after_fix: Re-run: add ritual → /checkout → fill step-0 → click step-next (URL stays /checkout, step-shipping visible) → click step-next (step-payment visible, checkout-finish appears, items NOT cleared) → click checkout-finish (URL goes to /checkout/sucesso, LS cart & promo cleared).

ui_bugs.issue: step-next at step=1 implicitly submits the form because the same <button> slot morphs from type='button' to type='submit' during the click — order is never completed.

action_items: Fix Checkout.jsx step-next/checkout-finish button reconciliation bug (see rca_of_the_issue.mitigation). After fix, verify entire checkout flow including /checkout/sucesso clearing cart + promo from localStorage.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.jsx: avoid morphing a single <button> slot between type='button' and type='submit'. Either render two distinct buttons, keep the wizard step-next outside the <form>, or always use type='button' and call finish() via onClick.
CartContext.clear() resets promo (good). totals.shipping correctly uses (subtotal - discount) so free-shipping threshold checks the discounted amount.
RitualBundle.jsx & CartDrawer.jsx are clean, small, well-tested data-testid coverage. No issues found.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-2 ritual bundle + drawer upsell + promo discount across pages all pass. The only failing flow is Checkout: clicking step-next from step 1 (shipping) accidentally submits the form due to React reusing the same button node while changing its `type` from 'button' to 'submit'. After main agent fixes Checkout.jsx (see rca.mitigation), retest steps 1→2→checkout-finish→/checkout/sucesso and verify localStorage 'divinarte-cart-v1' and 'divinarte-promo-v1' are cleared.
